title: coelogyne alata
intro: Coelogyne alata is an orchid species native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its unique, flat, or almost wing-like labellum and fragrant flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Coelogyne alata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Coelogyne alata can be used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
